target: 50. The One Who Should Have Disappeared
Mio Kofune

The call you made
cannot be connected.
The area may have no signal,
or the phone may be turned off…

(Shin-chan, where are you…?
Sou said he was going to meet someone, but Sou's also out of range…
Tokiko isn't answering either…)

…Shin-chan…
Come back soon…

(Shadow Sickness…
My older sister died…
Shiori also disappeared…)
(If something happened to Shin-chan too…!!)

(Did I just hear something…?
Could it be…)
Shin-chan!!??

Eh??
Shiori-chan…!?

Over here…
Shinpei's over here…
Wait!! Stop!!
Whoa??
Oh no!!

Yikes!
Mio-chan!?

Totsumura!
I'm so sorry!!

Don't just jump out like that!
What's wrong with you, looking so panicked…

I-I just saw Shiori-chan!
Have you seen Shiori-chan??

What??
Did you find her??
Where? Where??
She ran that way, where you came from…

What the hell!?
Only Mio-chan ran this way--
Shiori-chan??

Ah.
…She vanished!?

This area… Did something happen here…?
What is this…?

Hey!
This manhole cover is loose…
(She pointed at the ground before vanishing…)

(What's going on!?
There's Shin-chan in there!?)
…Totsumura.
No no no no no no no no no!!

It's a mistake!
A kid girl couldn't have gone in there!
…Well, normally…
(But if that was Shiori-chan's shadow…)
Totsumura…
I don't want to!
You haven't even said anything yet!!
You want me to check inside??

No no no, I don't have time!
I'm busy!
I was about to go out for a drink in town!!

If my cool uniform gets smelly smells or stains,
Erika'll hate me!!
…More important than a person's life is a snack bar…

Ugh!
I-I mean, you know…
That's a good deed…

If you say you found a missing girl,
it'll be in the newspaper and you'll become a celebrity.
Erika'll probably look at you differently…

But if you don't want to, that's fine.
It's pointless to stop me anyway… I'll do it alone…
Wait!!
Mio-chan, come with me.

…No, it's not about glory or wanting to be popular!
Don't misunderstand!

I'm doing this as a hero of justice!
I just want to find Shiori-chan!!

…Thank you.
A false good deed is better than a true one…
…You're being too polite, Mio-chan!
